case_title: ELISANDRO CAMPOS VS. MAS SAKE, INC.,

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAS SAKE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SUITE 181

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ELISANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT MAS SAKE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SUITE 181 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
